subcodes.first_line: O seeker after God! All creation uttereth the name of God, yet seeketh Him not. They stand prepared for spiritual wayfaring, yet tread not its path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداجو جمیع خلق خدا گویند ولی نجویند متهیا سیر و سلوکند ولی نپویند مستفیض
subcodes.subjects: @condition of search, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
